message:
feat(output): highlight pack regex displays

- surface raw regex patterns in denial boxes, explain trees, and verbose pack listings using the existing rich/manual regex highlighter
- add pattern lookup coverage and verbose tree rendering tests
- include session occurrence tracking closeout/gate cleanup needed for all-targets clippy

files.patch:

         skipped_due_to_budget: false,
         branch_context: None,
+        session_occurrence: None,
     }
 }
